api_key.description: Instatus API key. Used only for Bearer auth; never logged.

base_url.description: Instatus API base URL override for tests or proxies.

page_id.description: Status page id required by the components/incidents/maintenances streams (parent-scoped resources).

component_id.description: Component id used by the component_detail stream.

incident_id.description: Incident id used by incident detail/update streams.

incident_update_id.description: Incident update id used by incident_update_detail.

maintenance_id.description: Maintenance id used by maintenance detail/update streams.

maintenance_update_id.description: Maintenance update id used by maintenance_update_detail.

generic_notice_id.description: General notice id used by generic_notice_detail.

audience_group_id.description: Audience group id used by audience_group_detail.

on_call_schedule_id.description: On-call schedule id used by on_call_schedule_members.

subscriber_search.description: Optional subscriber search query for the subscribers stream.
